Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 92 

NN_SPLMT_PHYS_ACT_OPTOUT_SW 

LABEL: Navigated Supplemental HRSN Physical Activity Opted Out 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation needs (NN): navigated supplemental health related social need (HRSN) physical activity 
opted out of further navigation services. 

LONG NAME: NN_SPLMT_PHYS_ACT_OPTOUT_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes
